name: sales-lead
description: Qualify → draft → push-to-CRM for inbound leads. The executor qualifies the lead, drafts outreach, and records it in the CRM. A human reviewer signs off the draft before it is queued.

stages.name: qualify
draft
stages.task: Draft a 3-paragraph outreach email for lead {{.Key}} based on the qualification, save it, and call finish.

stages.name: review
stages.task: Review the outreach draft for lead {{.Key}} before it is queued.

stages.name: push_to_crm
stages.task: Save lead {{.Key}} to the CRM and queue the approved email for sending. Call finish.
